benefits.title: Premium services for you and your family
benefits.description: Activate the Gold package and enjoy the best.

benefits.title: Card and currency exchange with the best rates

detail.title: Card and currency exchange with the best rates

features.title: Known exchange rate in advance
features.description: In the online Exchange you will find a non-binding offer of EUR and USD rates in advance, which you can then exchange immediately.

features.title: Exchange 24/7
features.description: You can exchange from anywhere and for free.

detail.title: Relax in airport lounges around the world

features.title: More than 1,500 airport lounges
features.description: All you need to enter is your card or the Priority Pass app.

features.title: 4 free visits per year
features.description: You can use them yourself or with your loved ones.

benefits.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

detail.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

features.title: Coverage up to CZK 15,000,000
features.description: Covers medical expenses abroad including assistance services and transport back to the Czech Republic.

features.title: Compensation for lost luggage and delayed flights
features.description: Your personal belongings and luggage are also insured up to CZK 30,000, plus compensation for flight delays or cancellations.

detail.title: Insurance for valuables, cards, electronics and phones

features.title: Insurance for lost personal items and electronics
features.description: If your personal belongings, valuables or electronics are lost or stolen, we will reimburse the purchase of new ones.

features.title: Contribution towards repair or purchase of a new device
features.description: If your mobile phone, tablet or smartwatch with Smart Banka installed breaks, you will receive a contribution towards its repair or the purchase of a new device.

features.title: Insurance against misuse of payment cards and payments
features.description: Applies to you and other cardholders on your account. Insurance covers misuse of electronic payments or misuse of electronic and mobile banking.

detail.title: Gold savings account. No limits, no conditions

features.title: Unlimited deposit amount and no conditions
features.description: The advantageous interest rate applies to every crown in your savings account.

features.title: You will get the savings account automatically
features.description: You don't need to open a savings account again, we will activate it for you automatically.

features.title: Rewards and Visa benefits programme
features.description: Enjoy even better benefits with our Rewards. You can save thousands of crowns a year and also gain access to the Visa benefits programme.

fees.title: Premium service with no fee? It's possible
fees.terms: The eligibility conditions are valid for the given month. If your situation changes, a different fee plan will apply in subsequent months according to the conditions for maintaining a Gold account.

info.title: With a balance over CZK 1 million
With an arranged mortgage from CZK 5 million
With an income of at least CZK 35,000
info.description: And a balance below CZK 1 million

newCard.title: The Gold package also includes a Gold card
newCard.description: You will have the Gold card with your account for free
newCard.otherAddressInfo: Want to send the card to a different address? Change your contact address in the About me section in Settings.

existingCard.title: You already have a Gold card. Activate the Gold package and get more benefits at a better price
existingCard.description: The card will be included in the package for free and moreover

newBenefits.title: Savings account with a better interest rate
Currency exchange with the best rates
newBenefits.description: Open 24/7, when opening a foreign currency account in USD, GBP, EUR.

existingBenefits.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

click2Pay.title: Faster payments at e-shops with Click to Pay
click2Pay.description2: you can pay using your email.
click2Pay.description3: Your card details are securely stored in the Click to Pay system, which includes many well-known brands from around the world.
click2Pay.terms: By continuing, you express your consent to the terms of service, which we will also save to your documents. You can deactivate this service at any time in Smart Banka.
click2Pay.emailInfo: If you have multiple cards linked to one email, you can always choose which one to pay with.
click2Pay.secondaryButtonText: I don't want to pay faster

staticDocuments.title: Please read and sign the parameters of the agreed products and services
staticDocuments.subtitle: We will save all documents to the Documents section in Smart Banka and Internet Banka.

busyLoader.title: Please wait, we need to check everything

scoring.title: We are reviewing your application
scoring.detail: It will only take a moment.

scoringDenied.title: The application cannot be processed
scoringDenied.detail: Unfortunately we cannot process your application for the Gold package.

error.title: Let's resolve this at a branch
error.detail: Do you have any questions? Call us or visit your nearest branch.

disagree.title: Unfortunately, we can't proceed without this...
disagree.detail: Do you have any questions? Call us or visit your nearest branch.

victory.title: We are preparing your premium Gold package. It will be active by tomorrow at the latest

listItems.title: As part of the package, we will also activate your Gold savings account.
The card will arrive within 14 days at the latest.
If you are subject to an account fee, we will deduct it automatically at the beginning of next month.
